title: narration 段 video_prompt.action 不足 20 词应被拒

segments.novel_text: 清晨的雾气尚未散去，叶尘已经在练武场上挥剑一个时辰。

image_prompt.scene: Misty morning at an ancient martial arts training ground with weathered stone tiles and a lone young swordsman practicing graceful sword forms under a massive weeping willow tree with delicate fog swirling slowly around the wooden practice dummies
